overview.title: Council Overview
overview.subtitle: Learn about our mission, structure, and impact

mission.title: Our Mission
content: The Student Council serves as the official voice of the student body, representing student interests and concerns to the school administration.
We work to enhance the student experience through organized events, community service projects, and meaningful initiatives that benefit our school community.
Our mission is to foster leadership skills, promote school spirit, and create positive change through collaborative efforts between students, faculty, and administration.

steps.description: Elected positions including President, Vice President, Secretary, and Treasurer

steps.description: Specialized roles focusing on academics, culture, sports, and community service

steps.description: Elected representatives from each grade level

steps.title: Committee Members

members.title: Council Members
members.subtitle: Meet your student representatives and department heads

president.name: Aarav Sharma
president.bio: Aarav is a dedicated leader with a passion for debate and community service. He has been part of the student council for three years.
responsibilities: Represents student body at school functions
Oversees all council activities and initiatives
achievements: Led the annual charity drive that raised ₹2,00,000
Organized the successful Mental Health Awareness Week

vicePresident.name: Priya Patel
vicePresident.bio: Priya is an accomplished debater and writer who believes in empowering student voices through effective communication.
responsibilities: Assists the president in all duties
achievements: Developed leadership workshop for junior students

secretary.name: Rohan Mehta
secretary.bio: Rohan is highly organized and dedicated to ensuring smooth operations of all council activities and documentation.
responsibilities: Maintains all council records and minutes
achievements: Created digital filing system for council documents

treasurer.name: Sneha Gupta
treasurer.bio: Sneha has a knack for numbers and organization, ensuring transparent management of all council funds.

items.name: Vikram Singh
items.department: Works on curriculum feedback, study resources, and academic events

items.name: Neha Joshi
items.department: Organizes cultural events, festivals, and performing arts activities

items.name: Arjun Kumar
items.department: Coordinates sports events, teams, and athletic development

items.name: Ananya Desai
items.department: Leads community service projects and charity initiatives

items.name: Riya Malhotra
items.department: Promotes sustainability and environmental awareness programs

items.name: Siddharth Rao
items.department: Manages digital initiatives and tech-related student projects

elections.title: Election Process
elections.subtitle: How we select our student representatives

process.description: Students submit nomination forms with teacher recommendations
Candidates present their manifestos and campaign ideas
All students from grades 6-12 vote for their representatives
Election results announced in special assembly
New council members sworn in during ceremony

initiatives.subtitle: Ongoing projects and programs led by the student council

items.title: Mental Health Awareness Program
items.description: Workshops, counseling sessions, and resources to support student mental health

items.title: Digital Student Feedback System
items.description: Online platform for students to submit suggestions and feedback

items.title: Peer Tutoring Program
items.description: Senior students tutoring junior students in various subjects

proposal.title: Propose an Initiative
proposal.description: Have an idea to improve our school? The student council wants to hear from you!
ways: Submit your idea using the initiative proposal form
Attend council meetings on first Wednesday of each month
Email your representatives directly with suggestions
Join committee meetings for specific initiatives

achievements.title: Council Achievements
achievements.subtitle: Notable accomplishments and impacts made by student councils over the years

items.title: Annual Charity Drive 2023
items.description: Raised ₹2,50,000 for local orphanage through various events
items.impact: Funded educational resources and infrastructure improvements

items.title: School Recycling Program
items.description: Implemented comprehensive recycling system throughout campus
items.impact: Reduced school waste by 40% and raised environmental awareness

items.title: Cultural Exchange Program
items.description: Organized exchange with international school for cultural learning
items.impact: 150 students participated in cross-cultural activities and workshops

items.title: Student Wellness Center
items.description: Established dedicated space for student relaxation and support
items.impact: Provides resources and quiet space for over 100 students daily
